name: AI Mailbox Assistant
description: Read, search, draft, send, and manage emails. Supports Gmail via MCP tools and IONOS/other providers via IMAP (imapflow) and SMTP (nodemailer). Inbox triage, email search, thread reading, drafting, sending, replies, attachments, and label management.

metadata.changelog_summary: Added IMAP/SMTP support for IONOS and other email providers via imapflow and nodemailer
